headline: RBC Capital Initiates Coverage On Alliant Energy with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $82
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Stephen D'Ambrisi   initiates coverage on Alliant Energy (NASDAQ:LNT) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $82.
